hero.desc: Even with just a paragraph, {brand} can automatically generate a parallel world of up to {agents} agents based on real-world seeds. Inject variables from a god's-eye view to find the {optimal} in complex group interactions.
hero.descHtml: Even with just a paragraph, MiroFish can automatically generate a parallel world of up to millions of agents based on real-world seeds. Inject variables from a god's-eye view to find the dynamic "local optimum" in complex group interactions.
hero.slogan: Let the future rehearse among agents, let decisions prevail after a hundred battles

dashboard.statusDesc: Prediction engine standing by. Upload unstructured data to initialize the simulation sequence.

step1.title: Graph Build
step1.desc: Real-world seed extraction & individual/group memory injection & GraphRAG construction

step2.title: Env Setup
step2.desc: Entity-relation extraction & persona generation & environment config agent parameter injection

step3.title: Simulation
step3.desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & auto-parse prediction needs & dynamic temporal memory updates

step4.title: Report
step4.desc: ReportAgent has a rich toolset for deep interaction with the post-simulation environment

step5.title: Interaction
step5.desc: Chat with any individual in the simulated world & chat with ReportAgent

console.promptPlaceholder: // Describe your simulation or prediction needs in natural language (e.g., What public opinion trends would emerge if University X reverses a student's disciplinary action?)

log.envRunning: Detected running simulation environment, shutting down...

log.goBack: Preparing to return to Step 2, shutting down simulation...
log.envCloseFail: Failed to close environment, trying force stop...
log.timeConfigFail: Failed to get time config, using default: {minutes}min/round

ontology.title: Ontology Generation
ontology.desc: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts real-world seeds, and automatically generates appropriate ontology structure

graphBuild.title: GraphRAG Build
graphBuild.desc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are auto-chunked and Zep is called to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations to form temporal memory and community summaries

complete.title: Build Complete
complete.desc: Graph construction is complete. Proceed to the next step for simulation environment setup.

init.title: Simulation Instance Init
init.desc: Create a new simulation instance and fetch simulation world parameter templates

profiles.title: Generate Agent Personas
profiles.desc: Using context, automatically extract entities and relations from the knowledge graph, initialize simulation individuals, and assign unique behaviors and memories based on real-world seeds

config.title: Generate Dual-Platform Simulation Config
config.desc: LLM intelligently sets world time flow, recommendation algorithms, individual activity periods, posting frequency, event triggers, and other parameters based on simulation requirements and real-world seeds

orchestration.title: Initial Activation Orchestration
orchestration.desc: Automatically generate initial activation events and trending topics based on narrative direction to bootstrap the simulation world

ready.title: Ready
ready.desc: Simulation environment is ready. You can now start the simulation.
ready.roundsDesc: MiroFish auto-plans {hours} hours of simulation, each round represents {minutes} minutes of real time
ready.firstRunTip: For first-time runs, we strongly recommend switching to 'Custom' mode to reduce rounds for a quick preview and lower error risk →

log.logsCleaned: Old simulation logs cleared, restarting simulation
log.reportSent: Report generation request sent, please wait...

step5.reportAgentDesc: Quick chat version of the report generation agent, with 4 professional tools and full MiroFish memory

tools.insightForgeDesc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation environment state, combining Global/Local Memory mechanisms for cross-temporal deep attribution analysis
tools.panoramaSearchDesc: Graph-based breadth-first traversal algorithm that reconstructs event propagation paths and captures the complete topology of information flow
tools.quickSearchDesc: GraphRAG-based instant query interface with optimized indexing for fast extraction of specific node attributes and discrete facts

graph.memoryUpdating: GraphRAG long/short-term memory updating in real-time
graph.finishedHint: Some content is still being processed. Consider refreshing the graph manually later.

history.title: Simulation History
history.replayHint: Step 3 "Simulation" and Step 5 "Interaction" must be started during runtime and do not support history replay
